actions.userDescription: Extracts the four-digit year from YEAR or DATE-style values.

title: F - Year
userDescription: Reduces YEAR or DATE values down to a clean four-digit year.

actions.userDescription: Copies or derives the album artist value used by save-path actions.

title: F - Artist to Album Artist
userDescription: Copies ARTIST into ALBUMARTIST for save actions that rely on album artist paths.

actions.userDescription: Converts feat-style guest markers in ARTIST into a semicolon separator.
Removes stray closing brackets from ARTIST after guest-marker normalization.
Normalizes semicolon spacing in ARTIST before splitting.
Collapses repeated whitespace inside ARTIST to a single space.
Builds or normalizes a feat. credit in TITLE.
Cleans ARTIST back to the primary credited artist.
Trims whitespace from ARTIST.
Trims whitespace from TITLE.

title: F - Fix Feat
userDescription: Moves featured-artist credits into TITLE using the same proven actions as your current feat tools, with a name that matches the fix-feat workflow.

actions.userDescription: Applies a regex cleanup to TITLE.
Applies a regex cleanup to TITLE.
Applies a regex cleanup to ALBUM.
Applies a regex cleanup to ALBUM.
Removes leading and trailing whitespace from tag fields.
Collapses repeated whitespace inside tag fields to a single space.

title: F - Strip Remaster
userDescription: Removes remaster/version clutter from TITLE and ALBUM, then tidies whitespace.

actions.userDescription: Sets GENRE using a formatting expression.
Applies case conversion to GENRE.

title: F - Style to Genre
userDescription: Copies STYLE into GENRE and normalizes the genre field casing.

actions.userDescription: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from tag fields.
Collapses repeated whitespace inside tag fields to a single space.

title: F - Trim Whitespace
userDescription: Trims leading, trailing, and repeated internal whitespace in tag values.
